structuralIssues.title: Four content sections empty
structuralIssues.description: content.standards_landscape, content.standards_development, content.key_risks, and content.sources_summary are all empty. ROC has 52 standards (21 hEN + 31 EAD) — the 2nd-largest EAD portfolio — with significant context worth documenting.
structuralIssues.action_required: Populate with proposed content from deep-dive report §8.

structuralIssues.title: EN 14509 (sandwich panels) cross-listed in SMP, ROC, WCF
structuralIssues.description: EN 14509 is tracked in SMP, ROC, and WCF standards[]. Data (AVCP, cited, DPP estimate) should be consistent across all three families. SMP deep-dive (Batch 1) flagged this as iss-SMP-003.
structuralIssues.action_required: Verify EN 14509 data consistency across SMP, ROC, WCF.

structuralIssues.title: EAD 020011 (roof hatches) potentially overlaps with ROC
structuralIssues.description: EAD 020011-00-0404 (roof hatches/smoke vents) is tracked in DWS but was flagged in Batch 1 as potentially relevant to ROC. Verify whether this EAD should also appear in ROC's standards[].
structuralIssues.action_required: Check EAD 020011 product scope against ROC family definition.

structuralIssues.title: Implementing Decision 2025/871 cites ROC-relevant EADs not in standards[]
structuralIssues.description: Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2025/871 (30 Apr 2025, amending 2019/450) cites 14 EADs. At least 2 are directly relevant to ROC: EAD 042461-00-1201 'Hydrophilic thermal insulation product of mineral wool for green roofs' and EAD 210195-00-0404 'Ultra-thin natural stone veneer sheets for walls and roofs'. EAD 230328-00-0108 'Rubber modified bitumen binders' is also tangentially relevant (bitumen input for roof coverings). None appear in ROC standards[]. EAD count (31) may need updating.
structuralIssues.action_required: Evaluate EAD 042461 and EAD 210195 for inclusion in ROC standards[]. If added, update ead_count and total. Check whether these EADs' product area matches ROC (PA 22) or are in adjacent PAs.

structuralIssues.title: EPBD 2024/1275 solar rooftop obligations interact with ROC photovoltaic EADs
structuralIssues.description: EPBD recast (Directive (EU) 2024/1275) mandates solar-ready rooftops: non-residential >250m² by 31 Dec 2026, residential by 31 Dec 2029. BIPV products (solar tiles, solar roof panels) require dual compliance: CPR (construction performance) + LVD/EMC (electrical). Several ROC EADs cover photovoltaic roof systems. EPBD obligation will massively increase BIPV demand and regulatory scrutiny. Transposition deadline 29 May 2026.
structuralIssues.action_required: Document EPBD interaction in content.key_risks. Monitor BIPV product standard development. Consider flagging photovoltaic roof EADs for dual-regulation note.

structuralIssues.title: Wienerberger leads EPD readiness but BMI Group (largest EU roofing manufacturer) has no EPDs
structuralIssues.description: Wienerberger publishes EPDs for clay roof tiles (DE, FR), accessories, and Sandtoft In-Roof Solar (UK) — the latter a BIPV product with both EN 15804 environmental data and BROOF[t4] fire certification. However, BMI Group (formed by Standard Industries combining Braas Monier + Icopal, largest EU roofing manufacturer) has no EPDs found. Split EPD readiness mirrors WBP pattern (Kronospan gap vs EGGER/Pfleiderer readiness).
structuralIssues.source: Wienerberger UK EPDs (https://www.wienerberger.co.uk/about-us/sustainability/environmental-product-declarations.html); Sandtoft Solar EPD (https://www.wienerberger.co.uk/about-us/news-blogs/in-roof-solar-epd.html); BMI Group (https://bmigroupinternational.com/)
structuralIssues.action_required: Document EPD readiness split in content. Note Wienerberger BIPV EPD as DPP-ready exemplar.

structuralIssues.title: BIPV roof products need dual DPP data: CPR construction + IEC electrical performance
structuralIssues.description: Building-Integrated Photovoltaic (BIPV) roof products require dual certification: CPR (construction performance, fire safety BROOF) + IEC 61215/61730 (photovoltaic module electrical safety). European BIPV market growing from $7.4B (2022) to $16.5B (2033). Italy Dec 2025 heritage reform unlocked protected buildings for 'virtually invisible' solar tiles. No harmonised approach to dual-regulation DPP (construction + electrical in single passport) exists.
structuralIssues.source: Electrek Roofit.Solar (https://electrek.co/2026/02/18/european-company-sleek-solar-roof-just-made-its-us-debut/); PV Magazine ML System (https://www.pv-magazine.com/2026/01/06/ml-system-unveils-solar-facade-panels-roof-integrated-pv-tiles/)
structuralIssues.action_required: Document BIPV dual-DPP challenge in content. Monitor harmonisation of CPR/IEC product classification for BIPV.

structuralIssues.title: Green roofs recognised in EPBD for first time — new product demand and DPP complexity
structuralIssues.description: EPBD recast (Directive 2024/1275) acknowledges green roofs for first time: member states must consider green roofs when meeting solar energy obligations. EAD 042461-00-1201 (hydrophilic mineral wool for green roofs) newly cited via Implementing Decision 2025/871. Green roofs lower surface temperatures 20-30°C. Multi-layer green roof systems (waterproofing + insulation + drainage + growing medium + vegetation) create component vs system DPP data challenge.
structuralIssues.action_required: Document green roof EPBD integration in content. Consider DPP implications for multi-layer roof systems.
